name: Aid
desc: Your spell bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve.
Choose up to three creatures within range.
Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration.

name: Animate Objects
desc: You bring objects to life under your control.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
desc: You cause an object or creature to radiate either antipathy or sympathy.

name: Banishment
desc: You attempt to banish a creature you can see within range to another plane.

name: Blade Ward
desc: You extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding in the air. Until the end of your next turn, the next creature that hits you with an attack roll has Disadvantage on the attack roll.
duration: until end of your next turn

name: Bless
desc: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range.
A target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one attack roll or ability check before the spell ends.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: One creature you can see within range must make a Constitution saving throw.

name: Burning Hands
desc: Flames scorch the air in a 15-foot cone.
Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw.

name: Calm Emotions
desc: You attempt to suppress strong emotions in a group of creatures.
Each humanoid in a 20-foot cube must make a Charisma saving throw.

name: Chain Lightning
desc: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target of your choice.

name: Charm Monster
desc: You attempt to charm a creature you can see within range.

name: Charm Person
desc: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see within range.
It must make a Wisdom saving throw, and it does so with Advantage if you or your companions are fighting it.
If it fails the saving throw, it is charmed by you for the spell's duration, until you or your companions do anything harmful to it, or until the spell ends.

name: Circle of Death
desc: A dark purple sphere of negative energy spreads from a point you choose within range.

name: Color Spray
desc: You create a dazzling array of flashing, colored lights.
Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw.
On a failed save, a creature is blinded until the end of its next turn.

name: Command
desc: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range.
The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn.

name: Cone of Cold
desc: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands.

name: Confusion
desc: This spell causes confusion in a group of creatures.

name: Counterspell
desc: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Dancing Lights
desc: You create a light source or sound effect.

Light: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range. They appear within 10 feet of each other in an area you choose. Each light sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius. As a bonus action, you can move the lights to new locations within range.

Sound: You create a sound no louder than a whisper from an area no larger than 5 feet on a side within range. The sound is produced by a source you choose, such as a drum, a flute, or a humanoid voice. The sound lasts for 1 minute.
material: a bit of phosphorus or wychwood

name: Darkness
desc: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range.
material: bat guano and a drop of pitch

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc: A bead of fire springs forth from your hand and zooms toward a point you choose within range.

name: Detect Magic
desc: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you.
If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you know its school of magic.

name: Dimension Door
desc: You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range.

name: Disintegrate
desc: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger.

name: Dispel Magic
desc: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range.

name: Dissonant Whispers
desc: You whisper discordant notes that only one creature of your choice within range can hear.
That creature must make a Wisdom saving throw.
On a failed save, it takes 3d6 psychic damage and must immediately use its reaction to move a distance equal to its speed away from you in a random direction.

name: Divine Favor
desc: You imbue yourself with divine power.
Until the spell ends, the next time you hit with a weapon attack on your turn, the target takes an extra 1d4 radiant damage.

name: Divine Smite
desc: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend one spell slot to deal radiant damage to the target.

name: Dominate Beast
desc: You attempt to beguile a beast that you can see within range.

name: Dominate Monster
desc: You attempt to beguile a creature that you can see within range.

name: Dominate Person
desc: You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range.

name: Druidcraft
desc: You create a minor magical effect such as a sudden gust of wind, a small flame to flicker, or a color to shift. The effect has no volume and lasts for 1 round.
You can cast this spell an unlimited number of times.

name: Earthquake
desc: An earthquake strikes the ground in a square area you choose within range.

name: Eldritch Blast
desc: You create a beam of crackling energy. Make a ranged spell attack against a creature within range.
On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage.

The spell creates more than one beam when you reach higher levels: two beams at 5th level, three beams at 11th level, and four beams at 17th level. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different targets.

name: Enhance Ability
desc: You touch a creature and bestow a magical enhancement.
The target gains one of the following effects of your choice.
material: fur or a feather from a beast

name: Enlarge/Reduce
desc: You cause a creature or object you can see within range to grow larger or smaller.

name: Ensnaring Strike
desc: The next time you hit with a weapon attack before this spell ends, the attack deals extra damage.
The target must also succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained by thorny vines until the spell ends.

name: Entangle
desc: You cause sensitive plants in a 20-foot square to sprout and reach for creatures within it.
Each creature in that area must make a Strength saving throw.

name: Etherealness
desc: You step into the border region between the Material Plane and the Ethereal Plane.

name: Eyebite
desc: You close your eyes and tap into a well of dark magic.

name: Faerie Fire
desc: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light.
Any creature in the area when the spell is cast is also surrounded by this light if it makes a Dexterity saving throw.

name: Feign Death
desc: You touch a willing creature and place it in a stasis-like state.

name: Finger of Death
desc: You create a necrotic wave of energy in a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide.

name: Fire Bolt
desc: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target.
On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage.
The spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you reach 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

name: Fire Shield
desc: Flaming or icy energy shrouds your body for the duration.

name: Fly
desc: You touch a willing creature.

name: Forcecage
desc: An immobile, invisible, cube-shaped prison composed of force springs into existence.

name: Gate
desc: You tap into the planes of existence and tear open a gateway.

name: Greater Invisibility
desc: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends.

name: Greater Restoration
desc: You imbue a creature you touch with positive energy to undo a powerful effect.

name: Guards and Wards
desc: You design a system of magical traps and wards to protect an area.

name: Guidance
desc: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the creature can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check. The spell ends if you cast it again.

name: Guidance
desc: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the creature can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check. The spell ends if you cast it again.

name: Guiding Bolt
desc: A flaring, radiant bolt of energy springs forth from your hand and races toward a creature within range.
Make a ranged spell attack against the target.
On a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against this target before the end of your next turn has Advantage.

name: Haste
desc: Choose a creature you can see within range.

name: Healing Word
desc: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

name: Hex
desc: You place a curse on a creature you can see within range.
Until the spell ends, the target has Disadvantage on ability checks made with the ability score you choose.
One other effect of your choice also applies.
material: a cuttlebone or a piece of bone from a dead human

name: Hold Monster
desc: You attempt to paralyze a creature that you can see within range.

name: Hold Person
desc: You attempt to paralyze a humanoid you can see within range.

name: Hunter's Mark
desc: You choose a creature you can see within range and mark it.
Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 damage to the target whenever you hit it with a weapon attack.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc: You create a twisting pattern of colored lights.

name: Ice Storm
desc: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc: You create a 20-foot-radius cloud of swirling embers.

name: Invisibility
desc: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends.
material: an eyelash encased in a bit of gum arabic

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: You touch a creature and can end one of the following conditions on it: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: Light
desc: You touch an object that is no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you choose.
The spell ends if you cast this spell again or dismiss it as an action.

name: Lightning Arrow
desc: You can transform your weapon or ammunition into a bolt of lightning.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc: A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you.

name: Locate Creature
desc: Describe or name a creature that is familiar to you.

name: Locate Object
desc: Describe or name an object that is familiar to you.

name: Mage Armor
desc: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor.
A shimmering field appears around the target, granting it a base AC of 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

name: Mage Hand
desc: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range and lasts for the duration.
The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you.
You can use your action to control the hand.
You can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open bag or pouch, or pour out the contents of a vial.

name: Magic Circle
desc: A 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall cylinder of magical energy forms around you.

name: Magic Missile
desc: You create three glowing darts of force.
Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: A burst of healing energy springs forth from your hand.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity to a group of creatures.

name: Mending
desc: This spell repairs a single object or creature, restoring 1d4 + 1 hit points.
The spell can mend a broken object, such as a chain, a vase, or a sword.
The spell can also mend a wounded creature, but only if the creature has at least 1 hit point.

name: Message
desc: You point your finger toward a creature within range and whisper a message. The target (and only the target) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear.
You can cast this spell through solid objects if you are familiar with the target and know it is behind the obstacle.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: You call down four exploding orbs of fire upon points of your choice within range.

name: Mind Spike
desc: You lash out with telekinetic force, striking a creature you can see within range with a spike of psychic energy.

name: Minor Illusion
desc: You create a sound or an image of an object within range.
Sound: You create a sound, such as a whisper, a roar, or a knock, that can be heard up to 30 feet away.

Image: You create a visual image of an object, creature, or other phenomenon within range that can be no larger than a 5-foot cube. The image lasts for the duration or until you use your action to cast this spell again.

name: Mirror Image
desc: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear in your space.
Until the spell ends, the duplicates move with you and mimic your actions.

name: Moonbeam
desc: A silvery beam of pale light shines down at a point you choose within range.

name: Pass without Trace
desc: A veil of shadows and mist radiates from you in a 30-foot emanation.
material: ash from a burned leaf of mistletoe and an olive branch

name: Phantasmal Force
desc: You create a phantasmal object, creature, or other visible phenomenon within range that is no larger than a 10-foot cube.

name: Plane Shift
desc: This spell lets you travel from one plane of existence to another.

name: Polymorph
desc: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: You speak a word of power that can kill one creature you can see within range.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: You speak a word of power that can compel one creature you can see within range to be stunned.

name: Prestidigitation
desc: You perform a simple magical trick before the eyes of the target.
The trick can be a minor effect, such as lighting a candle, making a small object float, or cleaning an object.
The spell can also create a minor sensory effect, such as a gust of wind, a faint odor, or a soft sound.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc: Each of up to eight creatures of your choice within range must make a Dexterity saving throw.

name: Produce Flame
desc: You create a flickering flame in your hand. The flame illuminates a 10-foot radius and sheds dim light for an additional 10 feet.
While the flame persists, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your Druid spells.

The flame also deals 1d8 fire damage to any creature that hits you with a melee attack while the flame is in your hand. The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Reverse Gravity
desc: This spell reverses gravity in a 100-foot-radius, 400-foot-high cylinder centered on a point you choose within range.

name: Revivify
desc: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute.

name: Sacred Flame
desc: You invoke the power of your deity to call down a beam of radiant energy on a creature you can see within range.
The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage.
The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Scrying
desc: You can see and hear a particular creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you.

name: Searing Smite
desc: The next time you hit with a weapon attack before the spell ends, your weapon flares with fire.
The target takes an extra 1d6 fire damage, and it must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take an extra 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

name: Shatter
desc: A sudden loud roar, like the cracking of stone, erupts from a point you choose within range.
Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere must make a Constitution saving throw.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: A shimmering field appears and surrounds a creature of your choice within range, granting a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.

name: Silence
desc: For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range.

name: Sleep
desc: This spell sends a soothing force to creatures you can see within range.
Roll 5d8; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell affects.

name: Slow
desc: You alter the time around one or more creatures you can see within range.

name: Sorcerous Burst
desc: You unleash a bolt of arcane energy at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target.
On a hit, the target takes 1d8 force damage.
The spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Spike Growth
desc: The ground in a 20-foot-radius circle centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc: Fearsome spectral spirits float out from you in every direction.

name: Stoneskin
desc: This spell turns the skin of a willing creature you touch as hard as stone.

name: Suggestion
desc: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) to a creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you.
material: a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil

name: Sunbeam
desc: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a line 30 feet long and 5 feet wide.

name: Sunburst
desc: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range.

name: Symbol
desc: You inscribe a harmful symbol that activates when a creature reads or comes within 5 feet of it.

name: Teleport
desc: This spell instantly transports you and up to eight willing creatures of your choice that you can see within range.

name: Thaumaturgy
desc: You manifest a minor wonder, such as a sudden gust of wind, a small flame flaring to life, or a soft voice echoing from a nearby surface.
The effect lasts for 1 minute or until you use your action to cast this spell again.

name: Thunderwave
desc: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you.
Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Constitution saving throw.

name: Time Stop
desc: You briefly stop the flow of time for everyone but yourself.

name: True Seeing
desc: This spell gives you the ability to see things as they actually are.

name: True Strike
desc: You extend your hand and point a finger at a target in range. Your magic grants you a brief vision of the future and whether your attack would be successful.
The next time you make an attack roll against the target before the spell ends, you have Advantage on the roll.

name: Vicious Mockery
desc: You create a verbal disparagement of the target.
The target must make a Wisdom saving throw.
On a failed save, the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll before the end of your next turn.

name: Wall of Fire
desc: You create a wall of fire on a ground surface within range.

name: Wall of Stone
desc: An irregular wall of solid stone springs forth into existence.

name: Water Walk
desc: This spell grants affected creatures the ability to walk on any liquid as if it were solid ground.

name: Web
desc: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webs at a point you choose within range.

name: Wish
desc: Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast.
